metadata.file_path: /Volumes/My Passport/Ojo otra vez musica de Tidal Original descarga/Consolidado2025/Tracks/Bee Gees - More Than A Woman.flac
metadata.file_name: Bee Gees - More Than A Woman.flac
metadata.title: More Than A Woman
metadata.lyrics:
[00:09.28] Girl, I've known you very well
[00:11.20] I've seen you growing every day
[00:13.38] I never really looked before
[00:15.98] But now you take my breath away
[00:18.15] Suddenly you're in my life
[00:20.54] A part of everything I do
[00:22.69] You got me workin' day and night
[00:24.94] Just tryin' to keep a hold on you
[00:27.61] Here in your arms I found my paradise
[00:31.99] My only chance for happiness
[00:36.66] And if I lose you now, I think I would die
[00:40.02] Oh, say you'll always be my baby, we can make it shine
[00:45.02] We can take forever, just a minute at a time
[00:52.35] More than a woman
[00:57.18] More than a woman to me
[01:01.34] More than a woman
[01:05.88] More than a woman to me
[01:19.15] There are stories old and true
[01:21.35] Of people so in love like you and me
[01:23.89] And I can see myself
[01:25.99] Let history repeat itself
[01:28.26] Reflecting how I feel for you
[01:30.45] Thinking about those people
[01:32.01] Then I know that in a thousand years
[01:34.93] I'd fall in love with you again
[01:37.46] This is the only way that we should fly
[01:41.96] This is the only way to go
[01:46.46] And if I lose your love, I know I would die
[01:50.10] Oh, say you'll always be my baby, we can make it shine
[01:55.27] We can take forever, just a minute at a time
[02:02.41] More than a woman (you are)
[02:06.80] More than a woman to me
[02:11.27] More than a woman (ooh, my baby)
[02:15.78] More than a woman to me
[02:31.67] More than a woman
[02:36.02] More than a woman to me (oh, so much more)
[02:40.73] More than a woman (oh, baby)
[02:45.18] More than a woman to me
[02:49.77] More than a woman
[02:54.14] More than a woman to me
[02:58.76] More than a woman (oh, my baby)
[03:03.22] More than a woman to me
[03:07.87] More than a woman
[03:12.48] More than a woman to me
[03:14.66]
